task: Launch-quality advanced task: Produce an ICU Acuity Staffing Optimizer using only the supplied embedded packet. Compute derived metrics and normalized risk per the supplied formula, classify each record (pass/warn/fail or needs_review), identify the smallest defensible intervention within the provided budget, and produce a staffing and escalation plan plus a concise charge nurse brief. Deliverables: icu_staffing_optimizer.xlsx (with formulas or executable logic and validation checks) and charge_nurse_brief.md (decision rationale, record-level citations, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table). Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review.
